title: workflows dates & statuses
excerpt: When creating a workflow, I want an email sent to a team member when a due date has passed and status is not Done.  Currently, I can only select when status is something and then I have to select 15 statuses.  It would m…

posts.author: awright (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: When creating a workflow, I want an email sent to a team member when a due date has passed and status is not Done. Currently, I can only select when status is something and then I have to select 15 statuses. It would make sense to have an option “when status is not” so I only hve to select Done. The automation has this option, but I need to use a workflow to build a more complex automation.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
What about this? When you’re using automations like ‘If Status IS Something’, the ‘IS’ is usually able to be clicked and changed to ‘Is not’
